title: antidesma gillespieanum
intro: Antidesma gillespieanum, also known as Gillespie's ironwood, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as helping to treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Antidesma gillespieanum include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water.
